title: Payroll Management and Compliances
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable HR workshop for handling payroll management and compliances more confidently.
whyThisMatters: Payroll Management and Compliances helps HR teams, managers, and administrators make better workplace decisions around payroll management and compliances. The workshop covers Compliance Context and Manager Responsibilities, Records, Terms, and Workplace Requirements, and Handling Common HR Risk Areas so participants can connect legal or payroll requirements to clearer documentation and daily practice.
builtFor: Line managers who handle employee issues
Business owners or supervisors who need people-compliance awareness
walkAwayWith: Understand the key responsibilities connected to the topic.
Identify common people-management or compliance risk areas.
Know when an issue needs escalation, review, or specialist support.
methodologyCaption: Participants work through realistic HR scenarios and documentation examples so the concepts stay connected to workplace decisions.
